title: payena betis
intro: Payena betis, also known as the Payena betis tree or Payena betis plant, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Payena betis plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments.
